description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a detachable keyboard and a large, flat display supported by a rear kickstand. The chassis appears to be made of a matte gray metal, likely aluminum or magnesium alloy, giving it a sleek and professional look. The keyboard is integrated into a thin base, with visible key outlines and a touchpad area, while the display is bordered by a thin bezel. On the right side, several ports are visible, including USB and possibly a charging port, while the left side is minimalistic. The back of the device features a single camera at the top center and a subtle square logo in the middle of the kickstand. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on portability and functionality.
description: A slim, gray laptop with a detachable keyboard, rear kickstand, and minimalist design, featuring visible ports and a subtle logo on the back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile, rear kickstand, and the open laptop with the keyboard and screen at a right angle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full screen, keyboard layout, and touchpad area, emphasizing the device's wide display and compact keyboard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the right edge with visible ports and the kickstand supporting the display.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back cover, central camera, and a square logo on the kickstand, with no ports or keyboard visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A square logo is visible on the center of the rear kickstand, with no text or additional graphics.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be off, with no visible content or illumination.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is visible and appears to use a QWERTY layout, with a function row and a compact design, but no numeric keypad.
